news_items.headline: Royals' Witt (knee) exits after making sliding pla...
news_items.summary: Shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. left the Royals' win over the Cardinals because of right knee discomfort after making a sliding play in the field.

news_items.headline: Bieber rejoins Jays, 'feeling good,' says manager
news_items.summary: Blue Jays righty Shane Bieber rejoined the team on Friday and could be activated from the injured list in the next few days, manager John Schneider said.

news_items.headline: Skubal: Tigers must rise before deadline 'or else'...
news_items.summary: Tarik Skubal has made it clear as the Tigers continue to fall further out of contention as the clock ticks down to the trade deadline: "Play better baseball or else."

news_items.headline: Angels' Trout suffers hamstring injury, put on IL
news_items.summary: Angels center fielder Mike Trout, who is batting .234 with 17 home runs and 36 RBIs this season, has been placed on the injured list with a hamstring injury.

news_items.headline: Yankees' Chisholm exits after foul ball to groin
news_items.summary: Yankees second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. exited Thursday's game against the White Sox after a foul ball ricocheted off the ground and into his groin area.

news_items.headline: Buxton addresses trade speculation: 'I'm a Twin'
news_items.summary: Amid speculation that he could be dealt ahead of the Aug. 3 trade deadline, Minnesota center fielder Byron Buxton reiterated, "I'm a Twin."

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB proposes amateur-entry overhaul
news_items.summary: MLB's proposed changes include cutting amateur signing bonuses by more than $150M, making high school players ineligible for the draft and instituting an international draft.

news_items.headline: I am increasingly convinced MLB does not like baseball
news_items.summary: A revamped draft system further exposes the ever-gaped maw the highest level of the sport has always been.

news_items.headline: For Father's Day: How becoming a dad changes MLB players' perspectives, on and off the field
news_items.summary: "I come home, [and] I got a little girl smiling at me," Aaron Judge said of his daughter. "She's not looking at swings. She's not looking at box scores."

news_items.headline: Blue Jays @ Cubs Game Thread
news_items.summary: One day I’d like to go to Wrigley Field. There is pregame news, Brendan Little is back, because we can’t have too many Brendans, Braydons, Brandons and all. He has walked few of late, just 2 in his last seven appearances, totally 7.2 innings. They won’t be happy until every player on the 26 man […]

news_items.headline: What to know about MLB's draft proposal: No more h...
news_items.summary: The league offered up a plan that would add an international draft and shake up the domestic version.

news_items.headline: Slumping Braves need Martin Perez magic as they host the Brewers and the Miz
news_items.summary: Braves are already slumping offensively and now have to face the current best pitcher in baseball

news_items.headline: Red Sox Minor Lines: Un-Tsung Hero
news_items.summary: Cheng goes yard and has 3 of Worcester’s 13 hits in a one-run loss. The Sea Dogs also had 13 hits in a one-run win.

news_items.headline: Giants-Marlins Series Preview: The Marlins’ best hitter was (briefly) a Giant
news_items.summary: The Giants take on a Marlins team that represents the best version of the front office Buster Posey replaced.

news_items.headline: The Phillies are owning the lousy and mediocre
news_items.summary: They may struggle against the elite, but they’re taking care of business against everyone else.

news_items.headline: The World’s Game: Mariners vs. Red Sox Series Preview
news_items.summary: The Red Sox are in town for a busy sports weekend in Seattle.
